Changelog

2026/03/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field updateClusterLocation was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field setAirPolicyAlertStatus was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field storageSizeGb was removed from GcpCloudSqlInstance type.
  • Input field nativeProtectionProjectIds was removed from GcpCloudAccountAddProjectsInput type.
  • Input field cloudAccountsProjectIds was removed from GcpCloudAccountAddProjectsInput type.
  • Input field features was removed from GcpCloudAccountAddManualAuthProjectInput type.
  • Input field sharedVpcHostProjectIds was removed from GcpCloudAccountAddProjectsInput type.
  • Input field feature was removed from GcpCloudAccountUpgradeProjectsInput type.
  • Input field account was removed from SupportPortalLoginInput type.
  • Enum value AVAILABILITY_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED was removed from enum GcpCloudSqlAvailabilityType.
  • Enum value CLOUD_SQL_ENGINE_UNSPECIFIED was removed from enum GcpCloudSqlEngineType.
  • GcpCloudSqlInstance.kmsKey field type changed from String! to String.
  • GcpCloudSqlInstance.edition field type changed from String! to GcpCloudSqlEdition!.
  • GcpCloudAccountAddProjectsInput.projectIds input field type changed from [String!] to [String!]!.
  • WebhookTemplateInfoInput.templateId input field type changed from Int to Long.
  • GcpCloudAccountAddManualAuthProjectInput.featuresWithPermissionGroups input field type changed from [FeatureWithPermissionsGroups!] to [FeatureWithPermissionsGroups!]!.
  • GcpCloudAccountUpgradeProjectsInput.featuresWithPermissionGroups input field type changed from [FeatureWithPermissionsGroups!] to [FeatureWithPermissionsGroups!]!.
  • GcpCloudAccountAddProjectsInput.featuresWithPermissionGroups input field type changed from [FeatureWithPermissionsGroups!] to [FeatureWithPermissionsGroups!]!.

Breaking: types

  • SetAirPolicyAlertStatusResult type was removed.
  • ClusterLocationEdit type was removed.
  • SetAirPolicyAlertStatusReply type was removed.
  • SetAirPolicyAlertStatusInput type was removed.
  • AirPolicyViolationStatus type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field inventoryRoot was deprecated in SelfServicePermission type.

    Reason: No longer in use. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/12.

  • Enum value EC2_INSTANCE_ID was deprecated in enum HierarchyFilterField.

    Reason: Use EC2_INSTANCE_NAME_OR_INSTANCE_ID instead. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/06.

  • Enum value AZURE_GRS was deprecated in enum RcvRedundancy.

    Reason: Use MULTI_REGION instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/03/15.

  • Enum value UNIFIED_ENCRYPTION_KEY_MGMT_BASED was deprecated in enum TargetEncryptionTypeEnum.

    Reason: Use UEKM_RSA_BASED or UEKM_AWS_KMS_BASED. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/04.

  • Enum value AZURE_ZRS was deprecated in enum RcvRedundancy.

    Reason: Use MULTI_ZONE instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/03/15.

  • Enum value UNKNOWN_AZURE_REDUNDANCY was deprecated in enum RcvRedundancy.

    Reason: Use REDUNDANCY_UNKNOWN instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/03/15.

  • Enum value COMPLIANCE_RETENTION_LOCK_CONFIGURED was deprecated in enum SlaMigrationIneligibilityReason.

    Reason: This reason is no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/04.

  • Enum value EC2_INSTANCE_NAME was deprecated in enum HierarchyFilterField.

    Reason: Use EC2_INSTANCE_NAME_OR_INSTANCE_ID instead. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/06.

  • Enum value DURABLE_REDUCED_AVAILABILITY_GCP was deprecated in enum GcpStorageClass.

    Reason: Use STANDARD_GCP instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/28.

  • Enum value CLOUDDIRECT_NAS_SHARE_HIDDEN was deprecated in enum HierarchyFilterField.

    Reason: Not implemented - no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/06.

  • Enum value AZURE_LRS was deprecated in enum RcvRedundancy.

    Reason: Use SINGLE_ZONE instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/03/15.

  • Enum value UDF_DATABASE_TYPE was deprecated in enum HierarchyFilterField.

    Reason: Not implemented - no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/06.

  • Field archivalLocation was deprecated in CascadingArchivalSpec type.

    Reason: Use archivalLocationToClusterMapping instead. Scheduled for removal after 2027/01/27.

  • Enum value ENCRYPTION_MANAGEMENT was deprecated in enum EventObjectType.

    Reason: Use UNIFIED_ENCRYPTION_MANAGEMENT instead. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/04.

  • Enum value ENCRYPTION_MANAGEMENT was deprecated in enum AuditObjectType.

    Reason: Use UNIFIED_ENCRYPTION_MANAGEMENT instead. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/04.

  • Enum value EBS_VOLUME_ID was deprecated in enum HierarchyFilterField.

    Reason: Use EBS_VOLUME_NAME_OR_VOLUME_ID instead. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/06.

  • Enum value EBS_VOLUME_NAME was deprecated in enum HierarchyFilterField.

    Reason: Use EBS_VOLUME_NAME_OR_VOLUME_ID instead. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/06.

  • Enum value IS_HOST_PROTECTED was deprecated in enum HierarchyFilterField.

    Reason: Not implemented - no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2027/02/06.

2026/02/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Input field spec was removed from MonthlyDaySpecInput type.
  • Enum value PREMIUM was removed from enum RcvTier.
  • Enum value PREMIUM was removed from enum RcsTierEnumType.
  • StartAzureAdAppSetupReply.tenantCloudType field type changed from O365AzureCloudType! to AzureCloudType!.

Breaking: types

  • MonthlyDaySpecDayOfWeekPatternInput type was removed.
  • MonthlyDaySpecSpecInput type was removed.
  • MonthlyDaySpecSpecificDateInput type was removed.
  • VsphereVmRefreshAgentInput type was removed.
  • VsphereVmUpdateAgentCertificateInput type was removed.
  • VsphereVmUnregisterAgentInput type was removed.
  • Mutation.vsphereVmUpdateAgentCertificate(input) type changed from VsphereVmUpdateAgentCertificateInput! to VmUpdateAgentCertificateInput!.
  • Mutation.vsphereVmUnregisterAgent(input) type changed from VsphereVmUnregisterAgentInput! to VmUnregisterAgentInput!.
  • Mutation.vsphereVmRefreshAgent(input) type changed from VsphereVmRefreshAgentInput! to VmRefreshAgentInput!.

Deprecations

  • Field type was deprecated in Column type.

    Reason: This field is not useful. Scheduled for removal after 2027/01/13.

  • Field listCidrsForComputeSetting was deprecated in Mutation type.

    Reason: This endpoint is no longer maintained and will be removed. Scheduled for removal after 2027/01/16.

2026/01/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field deleteSnapshotsOfObjects was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field deleteSnapshots was removed from Mutation type.
  • Input field account was removed from CompleteUploadSessionInput type.
  • Input field account was removed from ListAllUploadRecordsInput type.
  • Input field account was removed from InitializeUploadSessionInput type.
  • Input field account was removed from ConfirmPartUploadInput type.
  • Input field account was removed from GeneratePresignedUrlForDownloadInput type.
  • Input field account was removed from RemoveUploadRecordInput type.
  • Input field account was removed from GeneratePresignedUrlForPartUploadInput type.
  • Enum value UNRECOGNIZED was removed from enum SlaObjectType.

Breaking: types

  • DeleteSnapshotsInput type was removed.
  • DeleteSnapshotsOfObjectsInput type was removed.
  • Argument organizationId was removed from Query.isSfdcReachable field.

Deprecations

  • Field azureExocomputeNetworkSetupTemplate was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Azure networking resources creation for Exocompute using ARM template will not be supported. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/22.

  • Field gcpNativeProjectDetails was deprecated in GcpCloudSqlInstance type.

Reason: Deprecated, use gcpProjectDetails instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/19.

  • Enum value PHYSICAL_HOST_ROOT was deprecated in enum InventorySubHierarchyRootEnum.

Reason: This root is no longer in use. Scheduled for removal after 2026/05/22.

  • Field operations was deprecated in AuthorizedOps type.

Reason: Use authorizedOperations instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/12/02.

  • Field gcpNativeProjectDetails was deprecated in GcpNativeDisk type.

Reason: Deprecated, use gcpProjectDetails instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/19.

  • Enum value INITIALIZING_REPORTS was deprecated in enum ClusterSubStatus.

Reason: INITIALIZING_REPORTS is deprecated. Scheduled for removal after 2026/12/09.

  • Field dataManagementByObjectWorkloads was deprecated in TprRulesMap type.

Reason: Use tprRulesByObjectType instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/17.

  • Field gcpCloudAccountAddManualAuthProject was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use addGcpCloudAccountManualAuthProject instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/12/09.

  • Field gcpNativeProjectDetails was deprecated in GcpNativeGceInstance type.

Reason: Deprecated, use gcpProjectDetails instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/19.

2025/12/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field updateAwsComputeSetting was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field awsComputeSettings was removed from Query type.
  • Field updateCertificateCloudAccountMappings was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field listCertificateCloudAccountMappings was removed from Query type.
  • Field createAwsComputeSetting was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field allTargets was removed from Query type.
  • Field allAwsComputeSettings was removed from Query type.
  • Field deleteAwsComputeSetting was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field globalConfig was removed from AzureSubscriptionWithExoConfigs type.
  • SetGcpExocomputeConfigsInput.optionalHealthChecks input field type changed from OptionalHealthChecks to OptionalHealthChecksInput.

Breaking: types

  • OptionalHealthChecks type was removed.
  • CreateAwsComputeSettingInput type was removed.
  • UpdateCertificateCloudAccountMappingsInput type was removed.
  • CertificateInfoInput type was removed.
  • AwsCloudComputeSettingFilterInput type was removed.
  • DeleteAwsComputeSettingInput type was removed.
  • AwsCloudComputeSettingFilterField type was removed.
  • InterfaceCidrInput type was removed.
  • AwsCloudComputeSettingQuerySortByField type was removed.
  • ListCertificateCloudAccountMappingsResp type was removed.
  • CloudNativeCertificateInfo type was removed.
  • ClusterInfCidrsInput type was removed.
  • UpdateAwsComputeSettingInput type was removed.
  • ArchivalParameters type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field aggregate was deprecated in Column type.

Reason: This field is not useful. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/05.

  • Field setIpWhitelistEnabled was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: use setIpWhitelistSetting instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/05.

  • Field nullable was deprecated in Column type.

Reason: This field is not useful. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/05.

  • Field dimensional was deprecated in Column type.

Reason: This field is not useful. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/05.

  • Field createOnDemandMongoDatabaseBackup was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use createOnDemandMongoDatabaseBackupV2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/12/13.

  • Enum value OBJECT_AUDIT_LIST was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use OBJECT_PROTECTION_AUDIT_LIST instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/14.

  • Field ipWhitelist was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: use ipWhitelistEntries and ipWhitelistSettings instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/05.

  • Enum value SLA_AUDIT_LIST was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use SLA_AUDIT_LIST_NG instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/14.

  • Enum value AWS_ACCOUNT was deprecated in enum CloudNativeTagRuleFilterFields.

Reason: USE CLOUD_NATIVE_ACCOUNT filter instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/10/15.

  • Enum value OBJECT_AUDIT_DETAIL was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use OBJECT_PROTECTION_AUDIT_DETAIL instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/14.

  • Enum value INDEXING was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use LATEST_GLOBAL_OBJECTS instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/14.

  • Enum value SLA_COMPLIANCE was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use LATEST_GLOBAL_OBJECTS instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/14.

  • Enum value BACKUP_COMPLIANCE was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use LATEST_GLOBAL_OBJECTS instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/14.

  • Enum value SLA_AUDIT_DETAIL was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use SLA_AUDIT_DETAIL_NG instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/14.

  • Field updateIpWhitelist was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: use setIpWhitelistSetting to update the mode, or update/add/deleteIpWhitelistEntries to update entries instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/11/05.

2025/11/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field addKerberosCredential was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field set was removed from GlobalSmbAuthSettings type.
  • Field setShareExclusions was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field updateKerberosCredential was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field deleteKerberosCredential was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field createCustomReport was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field updateCustomReport was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field addSharesToSystem was removed from Mutation type.
  • Input field valuesV2 was removed from ReportFilterInput type.
  • CloudSpecificRegionOneof.gcpRegion field type changed from GcpRegion! to GcpRegion.
  • RubrikManagedRcsTarget.conversionOpt field type changed from RcvRedundancyConversionType to RcvConversionType.
  • CloudSpecificRegionOneof.azureRegion field type changed from AzureRegion! to AzureRegion.
  • CloudSpecificRegionOneof.awsRegion field type changed from AwsRegion! to AwsRegion.

Breaking: types

  • FailoverChart type was removed.
  • ReportChartType type was removed.
  • AddSharesToSystemInput type was removed.
  • RelativeTimeRange type was removed.
  • FailoverSortByEnum type was removed.
  • SnappableTable type was removed.
  • SonarContentReportTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • FailoverTable type was removed.
  • TimeRange type was removed.
  • FailoverGroupByEnum type was removed.
  • UpdateKerberosCredentialInput type was removed.
  • ActivityChart type was removed.
  • SonarContentReportChart type was removed.
  • SnappableTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • FailoverTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • UpdateKerberosCredentialReply type was removed.
  • SonarReportChart type was removed.
  • ActivityTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • InfrastructureChart type was removed.
  • UpdateCustomReportReply type was removed.
  • ActivitySeriesSortByEnum type was removed.
  • AddSharesToSystemReply type was removed.
  • RcvRedundancyConversionStatus type was removed.
  • CreateCustomReportInput type was removed.
  • UserAuditSortByEnum type was removed.
  • UpdateCustomReportInput type was removed.
  • CustomReportFilters type was removed.
  • TaskDetailChart type was removed.
  • ActivityTable type was removed.
  • AnomalyTable type was removed.
  • SonarReportTable type was removed.
  • InfrastructureTable type was removed.
  • SetShareExclusionsInput type was removed.
  • CreateCustomReportReply type was removed.
  • SnappableChart type was removed.
  • ReportTableType type was removed.
  • AddKerberosCredentialReply type was removed.
  • RcvRedundancyConversionType type was removed.
  • ActivitySeriesGroupByEnum type was removed.
  • AddKerberosCredentialInput type was removed.
  • GenericTimeRange type was removed.
  • SonarReportTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • UserAuditTable type was removed.
  • UserAuditTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • AnomalyTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • DeleteKerberosCredentialInput type was removed.
  • SonarContentReportTable type was removed.
  • InfrastructureTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • DeleteKerberosCredentialReply type was removed.
  • AnomalyChart type was removed.
  • UserAuditChart type was removed.
  • UserAuditGroupByEnum type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field migrationUnavailabilityReason was deprecated in RcvBliMigrationDetails type.

Reason: Use bli_migration_unavailability_reason instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/09/23.

  • Enum value GENERIC was deprecated in enum CloudDirectNasVendorType.

Reason: Use specific vendor types instead of GENERIC. Scheduled for removal after 2026/10/07.

  • Field migrationStatus was deprecated in RcvBliMigrationDetails type.

Reason: Use bli_migration_status instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/09/23.

  • Enum value UNKNOWN_ACCESS was deprecated in enum OpenAccessType.

Reason: enum value is deprecated. Scheduled for removal after 2026/10/07.

  • Enum value NETAPP was deprecated in enum CloudDirectNasVendorType.

Reason: Use FSXN (AWS FSx for NetApp ONTAP) or other specific vendor types instead of NETAPP. Scheduled for removal after 2026/10/07.

2025/10/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field relationships was removed from AzureAdObject type.
  • Input field dataTypeIds was removed from GetDataPreviewRequest type.
  • Input field requestedFields was removed from GetDataPreviewRequest type.
  • Enum value UNSPECIFIED was removed from enum BackupCopyType.
  • Enum value EndTime was removed from enum SortByFieldEnum.
  • MssqlDatabaseVirtualGroup.activeDbFid field type changed from UUID! to UUID.
  • DataHosts.protocol field type changed from String! to CloudDirectNasProtocolType!.

Breaking: types

  • TaskDetailTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • TaskDetailTable type was removed.
  • RelatedObjectIdsType type was removed.
  • Map type was removed.
  • TaskDetailTable type was removed from union ReportTableType.
  • Input field clusterId was added to CloudDirectCheckSharePathReq type.

Deprecations

  • Field gcpNativeProject was deprecated in GcpNativeDisk type.

Reason: Deprecated, use gcpProject instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/28.

  • Field taskDetailGroupByConnection was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: This endpoint doesn't provide new data. Use the count field in taskDetailConnection instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/09/16.

  • Field gcpNativeProject was deprecated in GcpNativeGceInstance type.

Reason: Deprecated, use gcpProject instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/28.

  • Enum value BACKUP_STRIKES was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use BACKUP_STRIKES_V2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/18.

  • Field downloadAuditLogCsvAsync was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use downloadFile instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/09/16.

  • Field relatedObjectIds was deprecated in AzureAdReverseRelationship type.

Reason: use relatedObjects instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/09/08.

  • Enum value AZURE_LAMINAR_OUTPOST_APPLICATION was deprecated in enum CloudAccountFeature.

Reason: Use LAMINAR_OUTPOST_APPLICATION instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

  • Field downloadReportPdfAsync was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use downloadFile instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/09/16.

  • Enum value ACTIVITY_SERIES was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use EVENT_SERIES instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/18.

  • Enum value AZURE_LAMINAR_TARGET_APPLICATION was deprecated in enum CloudAccountFeature.

Reason: Use LAMINAR_TARGET_APPLICATION instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

  • Enum value AZURE_LAMINAR_TARGET_MANAGED_IDENTITY was deprecated in enum CloudAccountFeature.

Reason: Use LAMINAR_TARGET_MANAGED_IDENTITY instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

  • Field relationshipType was deprecated in AzureAdRelatedItemCount type.

Reason: Deprecated, use relatedItemType instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/25.

  • Field gcpNativeDisableProject was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use gcpCloudAccountDeleteProjectsV2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/21.

  • Enum value PROTECTION_TASK_DETAILS was deprecated in enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Reason: Use TASK_DETAILS instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/18.

  • Field privateEndpointConnection was deprecated in RubrikManagedRcsTarget type.

Reason: Use privateEndpointConnections instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/09/12.

  • Field downloadReportCsvAsync was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use downloadFile instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/09/16.

  • Field gcpCloudAccountDeleteProjects was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use gcpCloudAccountDeleteProjectsV2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/21.

  • Enum value AZURE_LAMINAR_OUTPOST_MANAGED_IDENTITY was deprecated in enum CloudAccountFeature.

Reason: Use LAMINAR_OUTPOST_MANAGED_IDENTITY instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

2025/09/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field shouldSddThroughRba was removed from HostDetail type.
  • Input field awsNativeIsEligibleForEbsProtectionFilter was removed from AwsNativeEbsVolumeFilters type.
  • Input field shouldSddThroughRba was removed from HostUpdateInput type.
  • Input field shouldSddThroughRba was removed from HostRegisterInput type.
  • Enum value EndDate was removed from enum ReportTableColumnEnum.
  • Enum value NumOfFailed was removed from enum ReportTableColumnEnum.
  • Enum value NumFailed was removed from enum SortByFieldEnum.
  • Enum value NumOfCanceled was removed from enum ReportTableColumnEnum.
  • Enum value NumOfSucceeded was removed from enum ReportTableColumnEnum.
  • Enum value StartDate was removed from enum ReportTableColumnEnum.
  • Enum value NumSucceeded was removed from enum SortByFieldEnum.
  • Enum value NumExpected was removed from enum SortByFieldEnum.
  • Enum value NumCanceled was removed from enum SortByFieldEnum.
  • Enum value NumOfExpected was removed from enum ReportTableColumnEnum.
  • Enum value Object was removed from enum GroupByFieldEnum.
  • Enum value Date was removed from enum SortByFieldEnum.
  • CustomReportInfo.room field type changed from ReportRoom! to ReportRoomType!.
  • GlobalSlaReply.backupLocationSpecs field type changed from [BackupLocationSpec!]! to [BackupLocationSpec!].
  • AllCustomReportsInput.reportRoom input field type changed from ReportRoom to ReportRoomType.
  • CloudDirectProtocolNetworkConfig.protocol input field type changed from CloudDirectNetworkOverrideProtocol! to CloudDirectNasProtocolType!.

Breaking: types

  • ReportRoom type was removed.
  • CloudDirectNetworkOverrideProtocol type was removed.
  • TaskReportTableColumnEnum type was removed.
  • TaskSummaryChart type was removed.
  • TaskSummaryGroupByEnum type was removed.
  • TaskSummaryTable type was removed.
  • TaskSummarySortByEnum type was removed.
  • Input field clusterUuid was added to SetShareExclusionsInput type.
  • TaskSummaryChart type was removed from union ReportChartType.
  • TaskSummaryTable type was removed from union ReportTableType.

Deprecations

  • Enum value EXOCOMPUTE_EKS_MASTERNODE_INSTANCE_PROFILE was deprecated in enum AwsCloudExternalArtifact.

Reason: Instance profile corresponds to worker node in an EKS cluster, please use EXOCOMPUTE_EKS_WORKERNODE_INSTANCE_PROFILE instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/18.

  • Enum value IS_ARCHIVED was deprecated in enum SnapshotQueryFilterField.

Reason: A snapshot can potentially be uploaded to multiple archival locations. This field does not give the archival status of the snapshot - whether it is uploaded to all the archival locations or partially uploaded to a few locations. Hence, this filter field is deprecated and would be removed subsequently. Please use a combination of ARCHIVAL_LOCATION_IDS and SOURCE_SNAPSHOT_IDS fields instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/23.

  • Field type was deprecated in IdpClaimAttributeType type.

Reason: type is deprecated, use attributeType instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/05.

  • Field tableFilters was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: No longer supported. Scheduled for removal after 2026/08/07.

  • Enum value SLA_ID was deprecated in enum SnapshotQueryFilterField.

Reason: There is no concept of SLA ID on a snapshot. SLA is assigned to an object and snapshots are taken based on the configuration of the SLA Domain at that point of time. However, SLA configurations may change at a later point in time, without reflecting the change on the snapshot, if not retroactively assigned. Hence, this filter field is deprecated and would be removed subsequently. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/23.

2025/08/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field dummyFieldWithAdminOnlyTag was removed from Query type.
  • Enum value PHYSICAL_HOSTS was removed from enum DataViewTypeEnum.

Deprecations

  • Enum value AZURE_LAMINAR_TARGET_APPLICATION was deprecated in enum CloudAccountFeature.

Reason: Use LAMINAR_TARGET_APPLICATION instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

  • Enum value AZURE_LAMINAR_TARGET_MANAGED_IDENTITY was deprecated in enum CloudAccountFeature.

Reason: Use LAMINAR_TARGET_MANAGED_IDENTITY instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

  • Field isProvisioned was deprecated in AzureAdDirectory type.

Reason: Use provisioningState instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/20.

  • Enum value AZURE_LAMINAR_OUTPOST_APPLICATION was deprecated in enum CloudAccountFeature.

Reason: Use LAMINAR_OUTPOST_APPLICATION instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

  • Enum value AZURE_DISK_ATTACHED_VM was deprecated in enum HierarchySortByField.

Reason: This field is deprecated and no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

  • Enum value SAASAPPS_IS_RECOVERY_TARGET_ONLY was deprecated in enum HierarchyFilterField.

Reason: use SAASAPPS_ORGANIZATION_SCOPE instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

  • Enum value AZURE_LAMINAR_OUTPOST_MANAGED_IDENTITY was deprecated in enum CloudAccountFeature.

Reason: Use LAMINAR_OUTPOST_MANAGED_IDENTITY instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/07/07.

2025/07/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Enum value INFORMIX was removed from enum EventObjectType.
  • Enum value ROLE was removed from enum PrincipalRiskySummaryPrincipalType.
  • Enum value INFORMIX was removed from enum ActivityObjectTypeEnum.

Breaking: types

  • Input field isAfter was added to BulkRecoverySapHanaDbsConfigInput type.
  • Input field shouldInitializeLogArea was added to BulkRecoverySapHanaDbsConfigInput type.

Deprecations

  • Field failoverClusterTopLevelDescendants was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: No more users of failoverClusterTopLevelDescendants. Scheduled for removal after 2026/05/28.

  • Field resourceGroup was deprecated in AzureNativeHierarchyObjectType type.

Reason: Deprecated, use azureResourceGroup instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/10.

  • Enum value PHYSICAL_HOST_ROOT was deprecated in enum InventorySubHierarchyRootEnum.

Reason: No longer in use. Scheduled for removal after 2026/05/22.

  • Field allAttachedAzureNativeVirtualMachines was deprecated in AzureNativeManagedDisk type.

Reason: Deprecated, use attachedAzureNativeVirtualMachines instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/10.

  • Field resourceGroup was deprecated in AzureStorageAccount type.

Reason: Deprecated, use azureResourceGroup instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/10.

  • Field azureNativeResourceGroup was deprecated in AzureSqlDatabaseServer type.

Reason: Deprecated, use azureResourceGroup instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/10.

  • Field resourceGroup was deprecated in AzureNativeVirtualMachine type.

Reason: Deprecated, use azureResourceGroup instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/10.

  • Field azureNativeResourceGroup was deprecated in AzureSqlManagedInstanceServer type.

Reason: Deprecated, use azureResourceGroup instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/10.

  • Field resourceGroup was deprecated in AzureNativeManagedDisk type.

Reason: Deprecated, use azureResourceGroup instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/10.

  • Field subscription was deprecated in AzureNativeResourceGroup type.

Reason: Deprecated, use azureSubscription instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/06/10.

2025/06/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Enum value SCOPE_ASSIGNMENT_OF was removed from enum AzureAdReverseRelationshipType.
  • Enum value VMWARE_PURE_DATASTORE_SERIAL_NUMBER was removed from enum HierarchyFilterField.
  • MultiTenantHostSpec.multiTenantHostId field type changed from Long! to String!.
  • StartAzureAdAppSetupReply.warning field type changed from [AzureAdAppSetupWarningType!]! to AzureAdAppSetupWarningType!.

Deprecations

  • Field updateManagedIdentities was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use updateManagedIdentitiesAsync instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/05/17.

Additions

  • AwsNativeDynamoDbTablePointInTimeRestoreWindow type was added.

2025/05/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field shareCount was removed from CloudDirectNasNamespace type.
  • Field shareCount was removed from CloudDirectNasSystem type.
  • Field share was removed from CloudDirectSnapshot type.
  • Input field isRenewalInProgress was removed from GlobalCertificatesQueryInput type.

Deprecations

  • Enum value AZURE_ZRS was deprecated in enum RcvRedundancy.

Reason: Deprecated. Use MULTI_ZONE instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/03/15.

  • Enum value UNKNOWN_AZURE_REDUNDANCY was deprecated in enum RcvRedundancy.

Reason: Deprecated. Use UNKNOWN_REDUNDANCY instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/03/15.

  • Enum value AZURE_LRS was deprecated in enum RcvRedundancy.

Reason: Deprecated. Use SINGLE_ZONE instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/03/15.

  • Enum value MONGO_DB was deprecated in enum ManagedObjectType.

Reason: MONGO_DB is deprecated and no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2026/04/03.

  • Field attributesSummary was deprecated in PolicyObj type.

Reason: No longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2026/04/07.

  • Enum value NOT_SCHEDULED was deprecated in enum CertificateRotationStatus.

Reason: No longer applicable. Scheduled for removal after 2026/04/11.

  • Enum value RECOVERY_PLAN was deprecated in enum ManagedObjectType.

Reason: RECOVERY_PLAN is deprecated and no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2026/04/03.

  • Enum value AZURE_GRS was deprecated in enum RcvRedundancy.

Reason: Deprecated. Use MULTI_REGION instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/03/15.

  • Field statusFromDb was deprecated in Cluster type.

Reason: Use status instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/04/03.

Additions

  • GcpPermissionGroup type was added.
  • CloudDirectNasObject type was added.
  • AzureAdAdminUnitMembershipEnumType type was added.
  • SupportedAzureAdRegions type was added.

2025/04/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field downloadAnomalyDetailsCsv was removed from Query type.
  • Field maxProtectedAppsCount was removed from Query type.
  • Input field subjectContexts was removed from LlmFunctionCallInfo type.

Breaking: types

  • SubjectContext type was removed.
  • DownloadAnomalyDetailsCsvResponse type was removed.
  • SubjectContextType type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field deleteCloudWorkloadSnapshot was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use deleteUnmanagedSnapshots instead. Scheduled for removal after 2026/04/03.

  • Field attributesSummary was deprecated in FileResult type.

Reason: No longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2026/02/24.

2025/03/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field restoreObjectsDryRun was removed from Query type.
  • Input field template was removed from WebhookTemplateInfoInput type.
  • Input field userId was removed from AddCustomIntelFeedInput type.

Breaking: types

  • ActiveDirectoryObjectAttributeDiffValue type was removed.
  • ActiveDirectoryObjectRecoveryDryRunResponseData type was removed.
  • ActiveDirectoryObjectAttributesDiffResponseWithDetails type was removed.
  • ActiveDirectoryObjectRecoveryDryRunResponse type was removed.
  • ActiveDirectoryObjectRestoreFailedAttr type was removed.
  • WebhookTemplateInput type was removed.
  • ActiveDirectoryObjectAttributesDiffResponse type was removed.
  • Argument protectableClusters was added to Query.rscPermsToCdmInfo field.

Deprecations

  • Enum value VSPHERE_SNAPSHOT was deprecated in enum JobType.

Reason: VSphere snapshot poller is no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2026/02/11.

  • Enum value HYPERV_VM_V1 was deprecated in enum JobType.

Reason: Hyper-V VM poller is no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2026/02/11.

  • Field slaDomain was deprecated in CdmSnapshot type.

Reason: Associating an SLA ID with a snapshot could lead to a wrong idea since if the SLA is edited, then its config would be different from what is being seen . Scheduled for removal after 2026/02/10.

Additions

  • GeneratePreviewMessageForWebhookTemplateInput type was added.
  • MailboxForSelfService type was added.
  • FeatureDeleteStatus type was added.
  • ClusterProvisioningState type was added.
  • OnedriveForSelfService type was added.
  • DownloadAnomalyDetailsCsvResponse type was added.
  • AzureExocomputeOptionalConfigInRegionInput type was added.
  • TprRulesByObjectType type was added.
  • EnableIntegrationInput type was added.
  • IntegrationCreationInfo type was added.
  • GeneratePreviewMessageForWebhookTemplateReply type was added.
  • AzureNativeKeyVault type was added.
  • UpdateWebhookStatusInput type was added.
  • ReplicationBidirectionalConnectionStatus type was added.
  • NcdSlaConfig type was added.
  • OnPremAdProtection type was added.
  • ReplicationPairPauseStatus type was added.
  • PamIntegrationConfigInput type was added.

2025/01/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Input field destSystemName was removed from RecoverCloudDirectNasShareInput type.
  • Input field destExportType was removed from RecoverCloudDirectNasShareInput type.
  • Input field targetNetworkInterface was removed from UpdateReplicationTargetInput type.
  • Input field targetNetworkInterface was removed from CreateReplicationPairInput type.
  • Input field customHeader was removed from WebhookAuthInfoV2Input type.
  • Input field destShareName was removed from RecoverCloudDirectNasShareInput type.
  • VsphereDatacenter.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • VsphereVm.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • VsphereTag.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • VsphereTagCategory.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • VsphereComputeCluster.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • VsphereResourcePool.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • CloudDirectSnapshot.protocol field type changed from String! to CloudDirectSnapshotProtocolType!.
  • VsphereFolder.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • VsphereHost.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • VsphereVcenter.snapshotConsistencySource field type changed from String! to String.
  • ThreatHuntResultObjectsSummary.clusterInfo field type changed from ClusterInfoType to Cluster.
  • RecoverCloudDirectNasShareInput.destShareFid input field type changed from String to UUID.

Breaking: types

  • NetworkInterfaceDetails type was removed.
  • ReplicationInterfaceType type was removed.
  • ClusterInfoType type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field replicationSpec was deprecated in ClusterSlaDomain type.

Reason: Use replicationSpecsV2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/11/24.

  • Field updateAgentDeploymentSettingInBatch was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use updateAgentDeploymentSettingInBatchNew instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/12/19.

  • Field isIndexingEnabled was deprecated in AwsNativeEc2Instance type.

Reason: Deprecated, use fileIndexingStatus instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/11/26.

  • Field objectsPercentCoverage was deprecated in PolicyDetail type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use percentCoverage instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/11/20.

  • Field syncedClusters was deprecated in Role type.

Reason: Deprecated: use paginatedSyncedClusters instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/12/19.

  • Field replicationSpec was deprecated in GlobalSlaReply type.

Reason: Use replicationSpecsV2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/11/24.

  • Field allClusterWebCertsAndIpmis was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use clusterConnection instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/11/18.

  • Field isFileIndexingEnabled was deprecated in AzureNativeManagedDisk type.

Reason: Deprecated, use fileIndexingStatus instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/11/26.

  • Field isFileIndexingEnabled was deprecated in AzureNativeVirtualMachine type.

Reason: Deprecated, use fileIndexingStatus instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/11/26.

  • Field isIndexingEnabled was deprecated in AwsNativeEbsVolume type.

Reason: Deprecated, use fileIndexingStatus instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/11/26.

Additions

  • KubernetesNamespaceDescendantConnection type was added.
  • M365ObjectType type was added.
  • AzureAdAppRole type was added.
  • KubernetesVirtualMachine type was added.
  • MssqlAvailabilityGroupDatabaseVirtualGroupSortOrderInput type was added.
  • BulkUpdateNasNamespacesInput type was added.
  • DestTeamInfo type was added.
  • AzureAdAppRoleAssignment type was added.
  • AzureAdApplication type was added.
  • OracleSddDetail type was added.

2024/12/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field listIamPairsByCloudAccountAndLocation was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field logicalChildConnection was removed from MssqlHost type.
  • Input field accountName was removed from JobInfoRequest type.
  • Input field exportVcdVappSnapshotInfo was removed from JobInfoRequestDetails type.
  • CloudDirectNasShare.protocol field type changed from String! to CloudDirectNasProtocolType!.
  • ThreatHunt.createdBy field type changed from String! to User.
  • Query.webhookById field type changed from GetWebhookByIdReply! to WebhookV2.
  • CloudDirectNasSystem.vendorType field type changed from String! to CloudDirectNasVendorType!.

Breaking: types

  • CreateNewVappParamsInput type was removed.
  • ExportVcdVappSnapshotInfo type was removed.
  • MssqlHostLogicalChildTypeConnection type was removed.
  • VappNetworkSummaryInput type was removed.
  • ListIamPairsByCloudAccountAndLocationInput type was removed.
  • CreateVappNetworkParamsInput type was removed.
  • GetWebhookByIdReply type was removed.
  • VappExportMode type was removed.
  • ListIamPairsByCloudAccountAndLocationReply type was removed.
  • VappExportSnapshotJobConfigInput type was removed.
  • MssqlHostLogicalChildType type was removed.
  • MssqlHostLogicalChildTypeEdge type was removed.
  • Input field o365OrgId was added to MicrosoftPurviewConfigInput type.

Deprecations

  • Field userGroups was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use groupsInCurrentAndDescendantOrganization instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/22.

  • Field allUsersOnAccountConnection was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use usersInCurrentAndDescendantOrganization instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/22.

  • Field storageConsumptionValue was deprecated in RubrikManagedRcsTarget type.

Reason: Use consumedBytes instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/28.

Additions

2024/11/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field mipLabels was removed from FileResult type.

Deprecations

  • Field permissions was deprecated in RoleTemplate type.

Reason: Use explicitlyAssignedPermissions instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/28.

  • Field awsNativeAccount was deprecated in AwsNativeEc2Instance type.

Reason: Deprecated, use awsAccount instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/28.

  • Field awsNativeAccount was deprecated in AwsNativeS3Bucket type.

Reason: Deprecated, use awsAccount instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/28.

  • Field permissions was deprecated in Role type.

Reason: Use effectiveRbacPermissions and explicitlyAssignedPermissions instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/28.

  • Field awsNativeAccount was deprecated in AwsNativeRdsInstance type.

Reason: Deprecated, use awsAccount instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/28.

  • Field awsNativeAccount was deprecated in AwsNativeEbsVolume type.

Reason: Deprecated, use awsAccount instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/10/28.

2024/10/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field m365DayToDayModeBackupStats was removed from Query type.
  • Cluster.cyberEventLockdownSupportCaseDetails field type changed from CyberEventLockdownSupportCaseDetails! to CyberEventLockdownSupportCaseDetails.
  • CascadingArchivalSpec.archivalLocationToClusterMapping field type changed from [ArchivalLocationToClusterMapping!] to [CascadingArchivalLocationToClusterMapping!].

Breaking: types

  • DayToDayModeBackupStats type was removed.
  • Input field invalidateAllSessions was added to ResetUsersPasswordsWithUserIdsInput type.

Deprecations

  • Field mongodbSources was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mongoSources instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field mongodbCollections was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mongoCollections instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field updateMongodbSource was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use patchMongoSource instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field bulkDeleteMongodbSources was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use bulkDeleteMongoSources instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field createMongodbSource was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use addMongoSource instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field mongodbCollectionRecoverableRange was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mongoRecoverableRanges instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field mongodbCollection was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mongoCollection instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field mongodbSource was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mongoSource instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field deleteMongodbSource was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use deleteMongoSource instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field mongodbDatabase was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mongoDatabase instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field mongodbBulkRecoverableRange was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mongoBulkRecoverableRanges instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field recoverMongodbSource was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use recoverMongoSource instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

  • Field mongodbDatabases was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mongoDatabases instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/09/03.

2024/09/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Input field feedId was removed from DeleteIntelFeedInput type.
  • Mutation.deleteIntelFeed field type changed from DeleteIntelFeedReply! to Void.
  • LicenseConsumptionType.fetbConsumed field type changed from Long! to Long.
  • Mutation.updateCustomIntelFeed field type changed from UpdateCustomIntelFeedReply! to Void.
  • LicenseConsumptionType.usersProtected field type changed from Int! to Int.

Breaking: types

  • DeleteIntelFeedReply type was removed.
  • UpdateCustomIntelFeedReply type was removed.
  • M365Snapshot type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field aggregateClusterHealth was deprecated in ClusterConnection type.

Reason: This field is deprecated because it is no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2025/07/29.

  • Field objectId was deprecated in RbacObject type.

Reason: Deprecated: use managedId instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/08/12.

2024/08/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field getPermissions was removed from Query type.
  • Field effectivePermissions was removed from Role type.
  • Input field sourceClusterId was removed from ReplicationPairInput type.
  • Input field connectionStatus was removed from SetMissingClusterStatusInput type.
  • Input field targetClusterId was removed from ReplicationPairInput type.
  • DirectoryObjectAttribute.subProperty field type changed from [String!]! to [PropertyExtension!]!.
  • Mutation.switchProductToOnboardingMode field type changed from SwitchProductToOnboardingModeReply! to Void.
  • SwitchProductToOnboardingModeInput.orgId input field type changed from String to UUID!.

Breaking: types

  • SwitchProductToOnboardingModeReply type was removed.
  • Input field relationshipRestoreMode was added to RestoreAzureAdObjectsWithPasswordsInput type.
  • Input field sourceClusterUuid was added to ReplicationPairInput type.
  • Input field targetClusterUuid was added to ReplicationPairInput type.

Deprecations

  • Field restoreO365Mailbox was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use restoreO365MailboxV2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/07/30.

  • Field exportO365Mailbox was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use exportO365MailboxV2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/07/30.

2024/07/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field activeDirectoryObjectType was removed from ActiveDirectorySearchVersions type.
  • Field dnt was removed from ActiveDirectorySearchVersions type.
  • Input field keyVaultId was removed from AzureKeyVaultKeyIdentifierInput type.
  • LicenseConsumptionType.fetbConsumed field type changed from Int! to Long!.
  • SlaReplicationPair.sourceCluster field type changed from UUID! to SlaDataLocationCluster!.
  • SlaReplicationPair.targetCluster field type changed from UUID! to SlaDataLocationCluster!.
  • ListM365DirectoryObjectAttributesInput.orgId input field type changed from String to UUID!.
  • ListM365DirectoryObjectAttributesInput.attributeType input field type changed from AttributeType to AttributeType!.
  • ListM365DirectoryObjectAttributesInput.objectType input field type changed from DirectoryObjectType to DirectoryObjectType!.

Breaking: types

  • PhysicalHost object type no longer implements MongoSourcePhysicalChildType interface.
  • Input field maxResults was added to ListM365DirectoryObjectAttributesInput type.
  • PhysicalHost object type no longer implements MongoSourceDescendantType interface.
  • Input field kmsKeyVaultId was added to AzureKeyVaultKeyIdentifierInput type.
  • Query.decryptExportUrl(workloadFid) type changed from UUID to UUID!.

Deprecations

  • Field dataHosts was deprecated in MongoSource type.

Reason: Use hostDetails instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/07/30.

  • Field cloudAccountId was deprecated in CcWithCloudInfo type.

Reason: This field is deprecated because it is no longer used. Scheduled for removal after 2025/07/30.

Additions

  • AzureKeyVaultKeyIdentifierWithoutKeyVersionInput type was added.

2024/06/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field failuresAndWarningsStats was removed from Query type.
  • Enum value NF_ANOMALY_DETECTION was removed from enum DataViewTypeEnum.
  • Enum value ANOMALY_DETECTION was removed from enum DataViewTypeEnum.
  • Mutation.updateNutanixVm field type changed from Void to NutanixVmDetail!.
  • Org.allClusterCapacityQuotas field type changed from [ClusterCapacityQuota!]! to [ClusterWithCapacityQuota!]!.

Breaking: types

  • WorkloadTypeToEventCount type was removed.
  • FailuresAndWarningsStatsReply type was removed.
  • FailuresAndWarningsStats type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field logConfig was deprecated in GlobalSlaReply type.

Reason: Use objectSpecificConfigs instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/05/09.

  • Field updateClusterLocation was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use updateClusterSettings instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/04/22.

  • Field mandatoryTotpEnforcementDate was deprecated in GetMfaSettingReply type.

Reason: Deprecated. Query MandatoryTotpGracePeriod instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/04/26.

2024/04/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field snapshotId was removed from ActiveDirectorySearchVersions type.
  • ApplicationCloudAccountToExocomputeConfig.exocomputeConfigs field type changed from AwsExocomputeGetConfigurationResponse to [AwsExocomputeGetConfigurationResponse!]!.
  • AccountProduct.expirationDate field type changed from DateTime! to DateTime.
  • ActiveDirectorySnappableSearchResponse.versions field type changed from ActiveDirectorySearchVersions! to [ActiveDirectorySearchVersions!]!.

Breaking: types

  • Argument permissionsGroups was added to Query.azureCloudAccountPermissionConfig field.

Deprecations

  • Field vsphereVMRecoverableRange was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use vmwareRecoverableRanges instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/03/05.

  • Field vsphereVMMissedRecoverableRange was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use vmwareVmMissedRecoverableRange instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/03/05.

2024/03/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field replicationNetworkThrottleBypass was removed from Mutation type.

Breaking: types

  • ReplicationNetworkThrottleBypassInput type was removed.
  • Input field isRefresh was added to CreateCrossAccountPairInput type.
  • Input field workloadFid was added to AzureAdObjectTypeInput type.
  • Input field keywordSearchFilters was added to AzureAdObjectTypeInput type.
  • Input field keywordSearchFilters was added to SearchAzureAdSnapshotInput type.
  • Input field fqdn was added to CreateCrossAccountPairInput type.
  • Input field workloadFid was added to SearchAzureAdSnapshotInput type.

Deprecations

  • Field clusterName was deprecated in AwsCustomerManagedExocomputeConfig type.

Reason: Use clusterName from AwsExocomputeClusterConnect API instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/02/01.

  • Field recoverCloudDirectPath was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Not in use. Use recoverCloudDirectMultiPaths instead. Scheduled for removal after 2025/01/25.

2024/02/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field objectType was removed from ActiveDirectorySearchVersions type.
  • Input field objectType was removed from ObjectTypeSummariesFilter type.
  • Query.activeDirectorySearchSnapshots field type changed from ActiveDirectoryObjectSearchResponseConnection! to ActiveDirectorySnappableSearchResponseConnection!.
  • NutanixPrismCentral.duplicateObjects field type changed from [NutanixPrismCentral!]! to [CdmHierarchyObject!]!.
  • NutanixCategoryValue.duplicateObjects field type changed from [NutanixCategoryValue!]! to [CdmHierarchyObject!]!.
  • NutanixCategory.duplicateObjects field type changed from [NutanixCategory!]! to [CdmHierarchyObject!]!.
  • AddNodesToCloudClusterInput.shouldKeepResourcesOnFailure input field type changed from Boolean to Boolean!.

Breaking: types

  • ActiveDirectoryObjectSearchResponseConnection type was removed.
  • ActiveDirectoryObjectSearchResponseEdge type was removed.
  • ActiveDirectoryObjectSearchResponse type was removed.
  • V1SearchDomainControllerRequestObjectType type was removed.
  • Argument objectType was removed from Query.activeDirectorySearchSnapshots field.

Deprecations

  • Field protectedVolumesCount was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: This functionality is incorrect and deprecated. Scheduled for removal after 2025/01/16.

  • Field physicalUsedSize was deprecated in ManagedVolume type.

Reason: Use reportWorkload with the metric physicalBytes instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/12/16.

  • Field hypervServers was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use hypervServersPaginated instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/12/22.

2024/01/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field ransomwareInvestigationWorkloadScannedCount was removed from Query type.
  • Field setPrivateContainerRegistryDetails was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field deltaHits was removed from PolicySummaryDetails type.
  • Field totalHits was removed from PolicySummaryDetails type.
  • Field protectedRansomwareInvestigationWorkloadCount was removed from Query type.
  • Field pendingRansomwareInvestigationResultsCount was removed from Query type.
  • Input field hasNfsSupport was removed from NutanixFileServerParametersInput type.
  • Enum value K8S was removed from enum ActivityTypeEnum.
  • Enum value K8S was removed from enum EventType.
  • NasShare.nasSystem field type changed from NasSystem! to NasSystem.
  • ObjectTypeAccessSummary.objectType field type changed from String! to DataGovObjectType!.
  • UpgradeAzureCloudAccountPermissionsWithoutOauthInput.featureToUpgrade input field type changed from UpgradeAzureCloudAccountFeatureInput to [UpgradeAzureCloudAccountFeatureInput!].

Breaking: types

  • SetPrivateContainerRegistryDetailsReply type was removed.
  • RansomwareInvestigationWorkloadScannedCountReply type was removed.
  • ProtectedRansomwareInvestigationWorkloadCountReply type was removed.
  • ProtectedRansomwareInvestigationWorkload type was removed.
  • PendingEvaluationResults type was removed.
  • SetPrivateContainerRegistryDetailsInput type was removed.
  • PendingEvaluationResultsReply type was removed.
  • WorkloadScanned type was removed.
  • PcrAwsImagePullDetailsInput type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field mssqlDefaultProperties was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use mssqlDefaultPropertiesOnCluster instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/30.

  • Field allAzureSubnets was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use allAzureCloudAccountSubnetsByRegion instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/12/08.

  • Field exocomputeConfigs was deprecated in AwsFeatureConfig type.

Reason: Deprecated in favor of BYOK8s, use exocomputeConfigurations instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/30.

  • Field configs was deprecated in UpdateAwsExocomputeConfigsReply type.

Reason: Deprecated in favor of BYOK8s, use exocomputeConfigs instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/30.

  • Field k8sAppManifest was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Not supported anymore. Scheduled for removal after 2024/12/06.

  • Field configs was deprecated in AwsExocomputeConfig type.

Reason: Deprecated in favor of BYOK8s, use exocomputeConfigs instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/30.

  • Field allAzureResourceGroups was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use allResourceGroupsFromAzure instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/12/08.

  • Field configs was deprecated in CreateAwsExocomputeConfigsReply type.

Reason: Deprecated in favor of BYOK8s, use exocomputeConfigs instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/30.

2023/12/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field removeCloudClusterNodes was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field deleteAwsCluster was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field isTemplate was removed from VsphereVm type.
  • Field removeNodeForReplacement was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field deleteAzureCluster was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field replaceClusterNode was removed from Mutation type.
  • Input field csrIds was removed from DeleteCsrInput type.
  • Input field csrId was removed from GetCsrInput type.
  • Enum value K8S_RESOURCE_SET was removed from enum ManagedObjectType.
  • Enum value K8S_RESOURCE_SET was removed from enum AuditObjectType.
  • Enum value AUTOMATIC was removed from enum NutanixSnapshotConsistencyMandate.
  • Enum value K8S_RESOURCE_SET was removed from enum HierarchyObjectTypeEnum.
  • Enum value K8S_RESOURCE_SET was removed from enum ObjectTypeEnum.
  • Enum value K8S_RESOURCE_SET was removed from enum EventObjectType.
  • Enum value K8S_RESOURCE_SET was removed from enum UserAuditObjectTypeEnum.
  • Enum value K8S_RESOURCE_SET was removed from enum ActivityObjectTypeEnum.
  • Enum value CRASH_CONSISTENT was removed from enum NutanixSnapshotConsistencyMandate.
  • Enum value APP_CONSISTENT was removed from enum NutanixSnapshotConsistencyMandate.
  • NutanixVm.snapshotConsistencyMandate field type changed from NutanixSnapshotConsistencyMandate! to NutanixVmSnapshotConsistencyMandate!.
  • AddAzureCloudAccountFeatureInputWithoutOauth.permissionsGroups input field type changed from [PermissionsGroup!] to [PermissionsGroupWithVersionInput!].

Breaking: types

  • RemoveNodeForReplacementReply type was removed.
  • DeleteAwsClusterInput type was removed.
  • DeleteAzureClusterInput type was removed.
  • RemoveNodeForReplacementInput type was removed.
  • RemoveCloudClusterNodesInput type was removed.
  • ReplaceClusterNodeInput type was removed.
  • ReplaceClusterNodeReply type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Field deleteCertificate was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use deleteGlobalCertificate instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/15.

  • Field deleteSapHanaDbSnapshot was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Please use deleteUnmanagedSnapshots mutation instead or use the RSC UI delete button from snapshots page. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/02.

  • Field getKorgTaskchainStatus was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: Use taskchain field instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field updateCertificate was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use updateGlobalCertificate instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/15.

2023/11/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field physicalChildConnection was removed from ManagedVolumeMount type.
  • Field active was removed from PasswordComplexityPolicyTemplate type.
  • Field descendantConnection was removed from ManagedVolumeMount type.
  • Enum value JIRA_PROJECT_KEY was removed from enum HierarchyFilterField.
  • NutanixVmMountSummary.mountStatus field type changed from String to NutanixVmMountStatus.

Breaking: types

  • ManagedVolumeMountDescendantTypeConnection type was removed.
  • ManagedVolumeMountPhysicalChildTypeEdge type was removed.
  • ManagedVolumeMountPhysicalChildType type was removed.
  • ManagedVolumeMountPhysicalChildTypeConnection type was removed.
  • ManagedVolumeMountDescendantTypeEdge type was removed.
  • ManagedVolumeMountDescendantType type was removed.
  • PhysicalHost object type no longer implements ManagedVolumeMountDescendantType interface.
  • PhysicalHost object type no longer implements ManagedVolumeDescendantType interface.
  • PhysicalHost object type no longer implements ManagedVolumeMountPhysicalChildType interface.

Deprecations

  • Field orgName was deprecated in TaskDetail type.

Reason: taskOrg field captures the basic org details. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/02.

  • Field orgName was deprecated in Snappable type.

Reason: snappableOrg field captures the basic org details. Scheduled for removal after 2024/11/02.

  • Field vsphereVmRecoverFiles was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use vsphereVmRecoverFilesNew instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/09/27.

  • Field vsphereExcludeVmDisks was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Deprecated. Use excludeVmDisks instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/09/27.

Additions

  • NcdVmImageUrl type was added.

2023/10/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field deleteFailedClusterOperationJobData was removed from Mutation type.
  • Input field accountId was removed from UnmountDiskInput type.
  • Input field mountDiskIds was removed from UnmountDiskInput type.
  • Input field accountId was removed from MountDiskInput type.
  • Input field mountId was removed from UnmountDiskInput type.
  • Enum value PAST_90_DAYS was removed from enum PastDurationEnum.
  • Enum value START_OF_PROTECTION was removed from enum PastDurationEnum.
  • Mutation.unmountDisk field type changed from AsyncJobStatus! to Void.
  • Mutation.mountDisk field type changed from AsyncJobStatus! to MountDiskReply!.
  • MountDiskInput.snapshotType input field type changed from SnapshotType to SnapshotType!.
  • DeleteCsrInput.csrFids input field type changed from [UUID!] to [UUID!]!.
  • GetCsrInput.csrFid input field type changed from UUID to UUID!.

Breaking: types

  • DeleteFailedClusterOperationJobDataInput type was removed.
  • DeleteFailedClusterOperationJobDataReply type was removed.
  • VsphereDatacenter object type no longer implements VsphereFolderLogicalChildType interface.
  • Input field targetWorkloadId was added to UnmountDiskInput type.
  • Input field mountIds was added to UnmountDiskInput type.
  • Input field liveMountId was added to UnmountDiskInput type.
  • VsphereDatacenter object type no longer implements VsphereFolderDescendantType interface.
  • Input field workloadType was added to MountDiskInput type.
  • Argument featuresWithPermissionsGroups was added to Query.allLatestFeaturePermissionsForCloudAccounts field.

Additions

  • OpenstackVmSubObject type was added.
  • SearchAzureAdSnapshotInput type was added.
  • AzureRoleArmTemplateFeature type was added.
  • AzureAdUser type was added.
  • AzureAdObjectConnection type was added.

2023/09/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Input field roleCustomization was removed from ValidateAndCreateAwsCloudAccountInput type.
  • Input field name was removed from AwsNativeAccountInput type.
  • Enum value SAAS_APPS_OBJECT_TYPE was removed from enum SlaObjectType.
  • DlpConfig.policies field type changed from [String!]! to [String!].

Breaking: types

  • Argument features was removed from Query.allAwsPermissionPolicies field.
  • Argument awsCloudType was removed from Query.allAwsPermissionPolicies field.
  • Argument userAccessObjectsFilter was added to Query.policyObjs field.
  • Argument input was added to Query.allAwsPermissionPolicies field.

Deprecations

  • Field host was deprecated in SapHanaHostObject type.

Reason: Use systemHost instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/07/28.

2023/08/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field hostLogRetentionInSeconds was removed from MssqlDbSummary type.
  • Field hostLogRetentionInSeconds was removed from MssqlSlaRelatedProperties type.
  • Input field hostLogRetentionInSeconds was removed from MssqlSlaRelatedPropertiesInput type.
  • Input field logConfig was removed from SlaManagedVolumeClientConfigInput type.
  • Enum value ON_PREM_AD_ROOT was removed from enum InventorySubHierarchyRootEnum.
  • NutanixPrismCentral.lastRefreshTime field type changed from DateTime! to DateTime.
  • NutanixCluster.lastRefreshTime field type changed from DateTime! to DateTime.

Breaking: types

  • ManagedVolumeLogConfigInput type was removed.

2023/07/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field hostLogRetention was removed from MssqlSlaRelatedProperties type.
  • Field hostLogRetention was removed from MssqlDbSummary type.
  • Input field hostLogRetention was removed from MssqlSlaRelatedPropertiesInput type.
  • NutanixPrismCentral.cdmId field type changed from UUID! to String!.

Breaking: types

  • Argument objectRootIds was added to Mutation.removePolicyObjects field.
  • Argument objectRootIds was added to Mutation.addPolicyObjects field.
  • Argument workloadFid was removed from Query.decryptExportUrl field.
  • Argument clusterIds was added to Mutation.addPolicyObjects field.
  • Argument clusterIds was added to Mutation.removePolicyObjects field.

Deprecations

  • Field mappedCloudAccountIds was deprecated in AwsExocomputeConfig type.

Reason: Use mappedCloudAccounts instead, cloud account IDs of mapped accounts are contained in mappedCloudAccounts. Scheduled for removal after 2024/06/27.

  • Field mappedCloudAccountIds was deprecated in AzureSubscriptionWithExoConfigs type.

Reason: Use mappedCloudAccounts instead. The cloud account IDs of the mapped accounts are contained in the field 'mappedCloudAccounts'. Scheduled for removal after 2024/06/27.

  • Field allOrgsWithAccess was deprecated in GlobalSlaReply type.

Reason: This field is deprecated and has been replaced by the allOrgsHavingAccess field, which must be used instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/06/27.

  • Field isPactsafeEnabled was deprecated in EulaState type.

Reason: Use isPactsafeV2Enabled instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/06/27.

  • Field isAccepted was deprecated in EulaState type.

Reason: Use pactsafeEulaState instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/06/27.

2023/06/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field threatMonitoringMatchedFiles was removed from Query type.
  • Field hostname was removed from NutanixPrismCentral type.
  • Field username was removed from NutanixPrismCentral type.
  • Field hasImageConverted was removed from CdmSnapshot type.
  • Field createCrossAccountReplicationPair was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field threatMonitoringMatchedFileDetails was removed from Query type.
  • Field threatMonitoringMatchedObjects was removed from Query type.
  • Field singleUnifiedFeatureFlag was removed from Query type.
  • Enum value VIEW_INVENTORY_WITH_HIERARCHY was removed from enum Operation.
  • Enum value AZURE_AD_TENANT was removed from enum ObjectTypeEnum.
  • Enum value AZURE_AD_TENANT was removed from enum ManagedObjectType.
  • Enum value AZURE_AD_TENANT was removed from enum EventObjectType.
  • Enum value TYPE_ATLASSIAN was removed from enum SaasFeature.
  • Enum value AZURE_AD_TENANT was removed from enum HierarchyObjectTypeEnum.
  • Enum value AZURE_AD_TENANT was removed from enum AuditObjectType.
  • Enum value BOTH_HOSTS was removed from enum AzureHostType.
  • Enum value AZURE_AD_TENANT was removed from enum ActivityObjectTypeEnum.
  • Enum value AZURE_AD_TENANT was removed from enum WorkloadLevelHierarchy.

Breaking: types

  • CreateCrossAccountReplicationPairInput type was removed.
  • AttributeInput type was removed.
  • GatewayInfoInput type was removed.
  • ThreatMonitoringStats type was removed.
  • FlagDataType type was removed.
  • FileMatchConnection type was removed.
  • FileMatch type was removed.
  • ThreatMonitoringFileMatchDetailsReply type was removed.
  • ReplicationTargetDefinitionInput type was removed.
  • UnifiedFeatureFlag type was removed.
  • CreateCrossAccountReplicationPairReply type was removed.
  • ThreatMonitoringMatchedObject type was removed.
  • NatGatewayInfo type was removed.
  • ThreatMonitoringMatchedObjectEdge type was removed.
  • FileMatchEdge type was removed.
  • ThreatMonitoringMatchedObjectConnection type was removed.
  • UnifiedFeatureFlagInput type was removed.
  • SnapshotData type was removed.

Deprecations

  • Enum value GROUP_NAME was deprecated in enum TargetQueryFilterField.

Reason: We do not use archival groups currently. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/21.

  • Field ownerOrgName was deprecated in ClusterSlaDomain type.

Reason: This field has been deprecated in favor of ownerOrg field. Scheduled for removal after 2024/05/11.

  • Field awsComputeSettings was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: This query is no longer supported. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/29.

  • Enum value IS_MANAGED_BY_AUTO_AG was deprecated in enum TargetQueryFilterField.

Reason: We do not use archival groups currently. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/21.

  • Field updateAwsComputeSetting was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is no longer supported. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/29.

  • Field createAwsComputeSetting was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is no longer supported. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/29.

  • Field userNotifications was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: This query is deprecated. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/27.

  • Field deleteAwsComputeSetting was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is no longer supported. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/29.

  • Enum value IS_ARCHIVED was deprecated in enum TargetQueryFilterField.

Reason: Archived locations should not be queried for. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/21.

  • Field allAwsComputeSettings was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: This query is no longer supported. Scheduled for removal after 2024/04/29.

  • Field ownerOrgName was deprecated in GlobalSlaReply type.

Reason: This field has been deprecated in favor of ownerOrg field. Scheduled for removal after 2024/05/11.

2023/05/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field disableTprOrg was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field snapshotConnection was removed from MongoCollection type.
  • Field onDemandSnapshotCount was removed from MongoCollection type.
  • Field snapshotGroupByConnection was removed from MongoCollection type.
  • Field setUserSessionManagementConfig was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field missedSnapshotConnection was removed from MongoCollection type.
  • Field missedSnapshotGroupByConnection was removed from MongoCollection type.
  • Field lockIsolatedRecovery was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field cdmLink was removed from MongoCollection type.
  • Field newestArchivedSnapshot was removed from MongoCollection type.
  • Field snapshotGroupBySummary was removed from MongoCollection type.
  • Field newestReplicatedSnapshot was removed from MongoCollection type.

Breaking: types

  • SetUserSessionManagementConfigReply type was removed.
  • DisableTprOrgInput type was removed.
  • LockIsolatedRecoveryInput type was removed.
  • SetUserSessionManagementConfigInput type was removed.
  • MongoCollection object type no longer implements CdmHierarchySnappableNew interface.
  • MongoCollection object type no longer implements MongoDatabasePhysicalChildType interface.

2023/04/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field topRiskPrincipals was removed from Query type.
  • Field sidsPolicyHitsSummary was removed from Query type.
  • Field o365TeamChildSnapshotIDs was removed from Query type.
  • Input field versionTime was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • Input field prefix was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • Input field collectionIds was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • Input field restoreDbPassword was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • Input field targetDbName was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • Input field databaseIds was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • Input field sourceMongoDbClusterId was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • Input field restoreDbUsername was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • Input field targetMongoDbClusterId was removed from RecoverMongoSourceInput type.
  • MongoSource.sourceNodes field type changed from String! to [CdmMongoNode!]!.

Breaking: types

  • TopRiskPrincipalsReply type was removed.
  • O365TeamChildSnapshotIds type was removed.
  • PolicyHitsSummary type was removed.
  • SidsPolicyHitsSummaries type was removed.
  • TopRiskPrincipalSummary type was removed.
  • SidPolicyHitsSummary type was removed.
  • Input field input was added to RecoverMongoSourceInput type.

Deprecations

  • Field id was deprecated in ClusterDisk type.

Reason: Please use diskId instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/03/17.

  • Field backupO365SharepointDrive was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use backupM365SharepointDrive instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/03/13.

  • Field backupO365Onedrive was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use backupM365Onedrive instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/03/13.

  • Field backupO365Mailbox was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use backupM365Mailbox instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/03/13.

  • Field backupO365Team was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use backupM365Team instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/03/13.

  • Enum value DURABLE_REDUCED_AVAILABILITY_GCP was deprecated in enum GcpStorageClass.

Reason: Deprecated. Use STANDARD instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/28.

2023/03/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field failoverJobReports was removed from Query type.
  • Field clusterGroupByUpgradeInfo was removed from Query type.
  • Field blueprintNew was removed from Query type.
  • Field allBlueprints was removed from Query type.

  • Input field clusterUuid was removed from RetryAddMongoSourceInput type.
  • O365SnapshotItemInfo.snapshotId field type changed from UUID to String.

Deprecations

  • Field updateAutomaticAzureTargetMapping was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is deprecated. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field immutabilitySettings was deprecated in RubrikManagedS3CompatibleTarget type.

Reason: Deprecated: please use immutabilitySetting instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field updateAutomaticAwsTargetMapping was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is deprecated. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field createAutomaticRcsTargetMapping was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is deprecated. Please use createRcvLocationsFromTemplate. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field getKorgTaskchainStatus was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: This endpoint is not properly named. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field stopJobInstance was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: Use stopJobInstanceFromEventSeries instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field allVcenterConnectionStatuses was deprecated in Vcd type.

Reason: Use allVcenterConnectionsInfo instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/01/31.

  • Field createAutomaticAzureTargetMapping was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is deprecated. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field ibmDetails was deprecated in RubrikManagedS3CompatibleTarget type.

Reason: Deprecated: please use ibmDetail instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field createAutomaticAwsTargetMapping was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is deprecated. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

  • Field updateRcsAutomaticTargetMapping was deprecated in Mutation type.

Reason: This mutation is deprecated. Please use updateRcvLocationsFromTemplate. Scheduled for removal after 2024/02/17.

2023/02/01

Breaking: field and enums

  • Field createConfigProtectionSetup was removed from Mutation type.
  • Field updateConfigProtectionSetup was removed from Mutation type.
  • RcvEntitlementsUsageDetails.entitlement field type changed from RcvEntitlement! to RcvEntitlement.
  • RcvAccountEntitlement.entitlements field type changed from RcvEntitlementsUsageDetails to [RcvEntitlementsUsageDetails!]!.
  • SnapshotFile.workloadFields field type changed from WorkloadFields! to WorkloadFields.
  • O365SnapshotItemInfo.id field type changed from UUID! to String!.
  • O365SnapshotItemInfo.parentFolderId field type changed from UUID to String.

Breaking: types

  • CreateConfigProtectionSetupInput type was removed.
  • UpdateConfigProtectionSetupInput type was removed.
  • ConfigProtectionCaCert type was removed.
  • Input field shouldRunAsynchronously was added to BulkRefreshHostsInput type.

Deprecations

  • Field snapshotFilesDelta was deprecated in Query type.

Reason: This endpoint only works for Data Center workloads. Use snapshotFilesDeltaV2 instead. Scheduled for removal after 2024/01/31.
